themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Then the king's servants, which were in the king's gate, said unto Mordecai, Why transgresses...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוַ֥ת: commandment - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Haman's accusation: 'And Haman said unto the king, There is a certain people scattered abroad...". Word-study detail reinforces "לְהַנִּיחָֽם׃: to suffer - to deposit; by implication, to allow to stay".
